title: lyonia ovalifolia var. formosana
intro: Lyonia ovalifolia var. formosana, also known as the Formosan Lyonia or Taiwan Lyonia, is a plant species native to Taiwan and other parts of East Asia, belonging to the heath family Ericaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, due to its astringent and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antimicrobial and antiviral activities. In herbal preparations, Lyonia ovalifolia var. formosana is often used as a decoction or infusion, with applications in treating fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues.
